headline: Raymond James (RJF): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Over the last six months, Raymond James’s shares have sunk to $143.85, producing a disappointing 15.4% loss while the S&P 500 was flat. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

raw.headline: Raymond James (RJF): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?

headline: Raymond James Ltd. appoints Peter Moores as Chief Executive Officer
summary: Raymond James Ltd. (RJL) today announced the appointment of Peter Moores as Chief Executive Officer, pending necessary regulatory approval. Peter joins the firm during a milestone year for RJL celebrating 25 years in Canada and recently surpassing C$100 billion in assets under administration.

headline: Raymond James Appoints Peter Moore To CEO Position Pending Regulatory Approval
summary: During the transition period and, until Peter receives his regulatory approval from the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization, Paul Allison will remain CEO. Once established in the role, Peter will report to Paul

headline: Private credit’s ‘off-ramp’ emerges as investors look to cash out and default fears grow
summary: A "robust and growing" private credit secondaries market could serve as a pressure valve for the industry's current liquidity squeeze.
